race.comment: STEP QUICK (6) disappointed out in trip last start and didn't handle the tricky conditions either. Back slightly in trip now should help and he has plenty of options from the barrier. Best form stacks right up and he can notch up his maiden win in this suitable event. SKIBIDI (4) returned in good order at this track and trip a fortnight ago and looks ready to raise the bar. The inside draw should suit with Fawke on board and he can make his presence felt. LEGSLIKETWIGGY (11) is a 5YO mare on debut, but her recent trial coming in was very impressive. She showed good early speed there and she'll require that speed from a tricky barrier in this. Can give plenty of cheek in her debut. TEXAN STAR (7) can bounce back to form coming back to this track and trip.
